name: Cecilion
intro: Cecilion, the Embrace of Night, is a hero in Mobile Legends: Bang Bang .

abilities.name: Overflowing
abilities.description: Buff Cecilion increases his Max Mana by 10 and restores the same amount of Mana his skill hits an enemy target. Cooldown : 1 second. Cecilion has higher Max Mana and Mana Regen , and his skill damage scales with his Max Mana . Skill terms Max Mana The maximum of mana can have currently. Mana Regen Mana regens every 1 second.

abilities.name: Bat Impact
abilities.description: AOE Speed Up Cecilion orders a giant bat to dive in a designated direction, dealing 100–250 (+80% Total Magic Power) (+5% Total Mana) Magic Damage to enemies on the path. The giant bat will stay at its destination and launch another attack, dealing 200–500 (+160% Total Magic Power) (+10% Total Mana) Magic Damage to enemies and triggering Overflowing extra 1 time. In 6 seconds, every time Cecilion casts this skill, the mana cost will be increased by 1.8 time(s) (capped at 4 times). While casting this skill, he also gains 30% Movement Speed for 1 second. Skill terms Max Mana The maximum of mana can have currently. Magic Skill Deal Magic DMG to enemies. Triggers Spell Vamp. Movement Speed Movement Speed on the battlefield. Usually Calculated and Actual Movement Speed is equal. But when Movement Speed is below 230 or over 420 both Slowdown and Speedup Effect will decay. Calculated Movement Speed = Basic Movement Speed × (100% + All Speedup Effect% - All Slowdown Effect%).

abilities.name: Sanguine Claws
abilities.description: CC AOE Cecilion summons a pair of claws in a designated location. After a short delay, the claws will move toward each other and pull enemies along the way to the center, dealing 200–300 (+45% Total Magic Power) (+1.2% Total Mana) Magic Damage and immobilizing them for 1 second. Skill terms Immobilized A state that prevents a target from moving. The target can't use Blink within the duration. Magic Skill Deal Magic DMG to enemies. Triggers Spell Vamp.

abilities.name: Bats Feast
abilities.description: Burst Speed Up Cecilion unleashes Blood Demon power [for 6 seconds], increasing his Movement Speed by 60% (decaying rapidly over 1.5 seconds) and gaining immunity to slow effects . Meanwhile, he shoots 40 bolts of blood energy at the enemies nearby, each dealing 35–45 (+8% Total Magic Power) (+0.3% Total Mana) Magic Damage and slowing them by 3% (up to 30%) for 1 second. Hitting an enemy heals him for 10 and 1% of his lost HP . Skill terms Movement Speed Movement Speed on the battlefield. Usually Calculated and Actual Movement Speed is equal. But when Movement Speed is below 230 or over 420 both Slowdown and Speedup Effect will decay. Calculated Movement Speed = Basic Movement Speed × (100% + All Speedup Effect% - All Slowdown Effect%). Magic Skill Deal Magic DMG to enemies. Triggers Spell Vamp. Regen Effect Attribute that affects the actual HP Regen and Shield. The default ratio is 100%. Actual HP Regen/Shield = Original HP Regen/Shield × (100% + All Regen Effects Increase% - All Regen Effects Decrease%).

abilities.name: Moonlit Waltz
abilities.description: Shield Slow When Carmilla is nearby, Cecilion can call her into a Vermil Shadow possessed by him [for 5 seconds], providing 220–500 shield (scales with Carmilla's level). Carmilla can select a target place and land on there, gaining equal shield, dealing 220–500 Magic Damage (scales with her level) within the area of effect, and slowing them down by 30% for 1 second. Skill terms Shield Special HP is preferentially deducted when taking damage. The shield with shorter duration or lower points is usually preferentially deducted when multiple shields are stacked. Magic Skill Deal Magic DMG to enemies. Triggers Spell Vamp. Movement Speed Movement Speed on the battlefield. Usually Calculated and Actual Movement Speed is equal. But when Movement Speed is below 230 or over 420 both Slowdown and Speedup Effect will decay. Calculated Movement Speed = Basic Movement Speed × (100% + All Speedup Effect% - All Slowdown Effect%).
